statement: In every magma, Equation 2237 (`x = ((y * z) * w) * (u * v)`) implies Equation 905 (`x = y * ((x * z) * (w * u))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0978
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u v : G, x = (op (op (op y z) w) (op u v))) :
    ∀ x y z w u v : G, x = (op y (op (op x z) (op w u)))
